title: Certain code causes error in OPT_CLEAN pass

features.name: concatenation before multiplication
features.description: Code should include concatenation used to zero-extend operands before a multiplication operation

features.name: identical expressions differing only in constant offset with conditional selection
features.description: Code should include two arithmetic expressions that are structurally identical except for different constant offsets, where one expression is selected based on a condition

features.name: bit slice from multiplication result concatenated with single bit
features.description: Code should include a concatenation of a single bit with a bit-slice extracted from a multiplication result
